candidates.note: the SMARCA2-VHL degrader series spans weak..strong alpha + inactive cis-Hyp stereo controls (Farnaby et al. 2019 Nat Chem Biol); curation must split it into the >=2 strong / >=2 weak-neg / >=1 inactive systems the prereg composition requires.
